$comment: v2.0.0-rc1 dual-signature (Ed25519 + ML-DSA-65) conformance fixture (valid bundle; PASS path under verification_options.json contract). Phase 7.F.4 sub-arc A (session 98). bundle.zip generated by packages/example-bundle/scripts/conformance-fixtures/v2-bundle-base-generator.ts at DEMO_DAY_UTC=2026-04-22 using pinned dev keys (issuer-dev-v2-ed25519 + issuer-dev-v2-ml-dsa-65). bundle_type=example-demo (NOT customer-export) because v2.0.0-rc1's production ML-DSA-65 key is a placeholder pending Phase 7.F.4 deploy-bootstrap; only the dev-slot dispatch resolves to real pinned keys at v2.0.0-rc1. The reference Go verifier at apps/cli emits this results.json shape against the committed bundle.zip under flags `--allow-dev-key --allow-pending-ots --allow-anchor-pending` (verification_options.json contract). output_format_version="2" per spec §14.1 line 1632 + §18.10 v2-bundle requirement. checks[0].algorithm_verdicts (cardinality 2 with ed25519+ml-dsa-65 both pass) per spec §18.10 conformance contract — REQUIRED on v2 checks[0], FORBIDDEN on v1 bundles. partial_verification verdict mirrors the customer-export valid-bundle precedent: checks 8 + 9 are legitimately skipped (single-key topology + non-audit-log bundle_type respectively), and absent --offline opt-in, those skips count toward summary.warned per spec §14 aggregate semantics.

warnings: check 1 (manifest signature): DEVELOPMENT BUNDLE — verified with dev key, not for production trust; spec §18.7 requires development bundles bear an informational warning even on Pass

check 5 (OpenTimestamps Bitcoin anchor): manifest.anchors.opentimestamps: OTS submission declared pending Bitcoin confirmation with receipt_path=null (no on-disk receipt yet); --allow-pending-ots opt-in folds to pass — anchor pipeline run deferred to post-submission window; spec §10 requires pending OTS state with null receipt_path is the pre-receipt submission-deferred lifecycle state; receipt is written when the calendar response is captured

check 7 (GitHub anchor cross-check): github_anchors/2026-04-22.json: mirror_status="anchor-pending" for daily root date "2026-04-22" — V1 deploy-bootstrap state (--allow-anchor-pending opt-in: anchor commit deferred to Phase 5; operator MUST verify check 5 (OTS Bitcoin) + check 6 (RFC 3161) verdicts to confirm independent witnesses are present); spec §12 requires V1 anchor-pending state is operator-acknowledged degradation; full anchor verification awaits post-Phase-5 anchored commits

checks.skip_reason: bundle uses single-key signing topology; ephemeral-session attestation not applicable
bundle_type="example-demo" is not audit-log-export; dual-subtree composition not applicable
